docstrings.ItemPipelineManager: A manager class for handling item pipelines in Scrapy.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.close_spider: Closes the spider and its associated pipelines. Parameters: spider.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.close_spider_async: Asynchronously closes the spider and its associated pipelines.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.get_awaitable: A method to get an awaitable from a given method. Parameters: method.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.open_spider: Opens the spider and its associated pipelines. Parameters: spider.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.open_spider_async: Asynchronously opens the spider and its associated pipelines.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.process_item: Processes an item for a specific spider. Parameters: item, spider.
docstrings.ItemPipelineManager.process_item_async: Asynchronously processes an item. Parameters: item.
